title: Build a Balance Sheet
description: A three-table corporate balance sheet using CSS attribute selectors throughout. The sr-only class is targeted with span[class~='sr-only'] using !important overrides, year labels use #years span[class], and row types are styled with tr[class='total'] and tr.data. The sticky header uses position: sticky with z-index.
objectives: Use span[class~='sr-only'] to visually hide elements while keeping them accessible
Use tr[class='total'] attribute selector to style specific table rows
Use tr.data with background-image linear-gradient for striped row styling
Use position: sticky on a header row with z-index for persistent column labels
Use td:last-of-type within a row class to target specific cells

files.name: index.html
